title: Owl God requires fewer sacrifices with Owl sacrifice

card.rawText: Summon Requirement: This creature requires 3 sacrifices to summon. If one of the creatures sacrificed has "Owl" in its name, only 2 sacrifices are required.

effect.value: Summon Requirement: This creature requires 3 sacrifices to summon. If one of the creatures sacrificed has "Owl" in its name, only 2 sacrifices are required.

plan.title: Owl God requires fewer sacrifices with Owl sacrifice
plan.summary: Verify Owl God can be summoned with only two sacrifices when one sacrificed creature has Owl in its name.

notes: Read text first: Summon Requirement: This creature requires 3 sacrifices to summon. If one of the creatures sacrificed has "Owl" in its name, only 2 sacrifices are required.
